title: Chikem Mod
description:
Chickem Where It has Special  Power & Hoomans Can Ride it.
Ride special chickens, breed rare variants, and find GolChick loot in treasure sources.
body:
![Chikem Mod Banner](https://github.com/Prarambha369/chikemMod/blob/main/src/main/resources/assets/CHICKEMMOD.png?raw=true) [![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21--1.21.5-green.svg)](https://www.minecraft.net/) [![Loader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-blue.svg)](https://fabricmc.net/) [![Fabric API](https://img.shields.io/badge/Dependency-Fabric%20API-orange.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [![Java](https://img.shields.io/badge/Java-21-red.svg)](https://adoptium.net/) [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://github.com/Prarambha369/chikemMod/blob/main/LICENSE) [![Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-Repository-181717.svg?logo=github)](https://github.com/Prarambha369/chikemMod) [![Support](https://img.shields.io/badge/Support-Sponsor-ff69b4.svg?logo=githubsponsors)](https://github.com/sponsors/Prarambha369) Ride special chickems, breed rare variants, and discover GolChick loot in natural treasure sources.
--- ## Highlights - Mountable special chickems - Difficulty-based special breeding rates - GolChick Food and Goldie Egg progression - Treasure chest and fishing loot integration - Lightweight Fabric gameplay focus ## Special Breeding Rates When both parent chickens are fed GolChick Food: - Peaceful: **30%** - Easy: **24%** - Normal: **18%** - Hard: **14%** - Hardcore: **12%** ## Requirements - Fabric API - Java 21 - Minecraft 1.21-1.21.5 ## Support Scope - Primary support: **Single-player** - Multiplayer support depends on matching server/client mod setup and testing state ## Installation 1. Install Fabric Loader 2. Install Fabric API 3. Put `chikem-mod-.jar` in your `mods` folder 4. Launch with Fabric ## Links - Source: https://github.com/Prarambha369/chikemMod - Issues: https://github.com/Prarambha369/chikemMod/issues - Sponsor: https://github.com/sponsors/Prarambha369
